compartments.label: NEURONS
compartments.snippet: Gray shaded oval labeled 'NEURONS' containing the cell-type nodes ADF, AWB, URX, and RIC in Panel E.

compartments.label: ADF
compartments.snippet: Purple triangle labeled 'ADF' inside the NEURONS compartment in Panel E, associated with tph-1.

compartments.label: AWB
compartments.snippet: Green triangle labeled 'AWB' inside the NEURONS compartment in Panel E, associated with ser-6.

compartments.label: URX
compartments.snippet: Yellow hexagon labeled 'URX' inside the NEURONS compartment in Panel E, associated with mod-1. Also indicated by arrowhead in Panel C images.

compartments.label: RIC
compartments.snippet: Red pentagon labeled 'RIC' inside the NEURONS compartment in Panel E, associated with tbh-1.

compartments.label: INTESTINE
compartments.snippet: Green rounded rectangle labeled 'INTESTINE' in Panel E, containing nhr-76, ATGL, and β-oxidation / Fat loss.

genes.snippet: Purple triangle node in ADF cell within NEURONS compartment in Panel E; also used as transgene driver (Patgl-1::GFP reporter crosses) and mutant genotype in Panels A and B.
Green triangle node in AWB cell within NEURONS compartment in Panel E; also used as promoter in Pflp-8::mod-1SAS construct context.
Yellow hexagon node in URX cell within NEURONS compartment in Panel E; expressed under Pflp-8 promoter in transgene Pflp-8::mod-1SAS used in Panels C and D.
Red pentagon node in RIC cell within NEURONS compartment in Panel E.
Listed inside INTESTINE compartment in Panel E; solid arrow points from nhr-76 to ATGL.
Listed inside INTESTINE compartment in Panel E; receives arrow from nhr-76 and sends arrow toward β-oxidation / Fat loss.

tentative_edges.snippet: Solid pointed arrow from ADF (tph-1) to URX (mod-1) labeled '5-HT' in Panel E.
Solid pointed arrow (vertical, left side) from AWB (ser-6) to ADF (tph-1) in Panel E. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
Solid pointed arrow from RIC (tbh-1) to AWB (ser-6) labeled 'Oct' (octopamine) in Panel E.
Dashed pointed arrow from URX (mod-1) to RIC (tbh-1) in Panel E; dashed line indicates indirect or modulatory connection.
Dashed pointed arrow from URX (yellow hexagon / mod-1) to INTESTINE labeled 'endocrine signal' in Panel E.
Solid pointed arrow from nhr-76 to ATGL inside the INTESTINE compartment in Panel E.
Solid pointed arrow from ATGL toward 'β-oxidation / Fat loss' inside INTESTINE in Panel E; ATGL promotes β-oxidation and fat loss. [unconfirmed against figure in verification]
